working_on: Routine task P5-03: Logic seed (philosophical logic — modality, conditionals, paradox, vagueness, paraconsistent, deontic) — fifth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; single (non-pre-split) task with depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0050. Author 0090_seed_logic_part1.sql with ~25-28 logic nodes covering the six clusters phase_5.md T1-B names: modal logic (alethic; K/T/S4/S5; accessibility), conditionals (material vs subjunctive; Stalnaker-Lewis closest-world), paradox (semantic — liar, Curry, Russell), vagueness (sorites + supervaluationism / epistemicism / fuzzy), paraconsistent (LP, dialetheism), deontic (SDL + Chisholm/Ross/gentle-murder paradoxes). Within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges only (~32-40); cross-domain bridges to epistemology / metaphysics / philosophy of language / philosophy of math deferred to P5-11. Apply via Supabase MCP; verify with engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0090_seed_logic_part1.sql with ~25-28 nodes across the six logic clusters phase_5.md T1-B names (modal logic ~5-6, conditionals ~4-5, paradox ~4-5, vagueness ~4-5, paraconsistent ~3-4, deontic ~3-4) plus ~32-40 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges (cluster umbrella → theses; theses → derivative positions; cross-cluster edges where pedagogically required, e.g., propositional_logic → modal_logic, classical_logic → paraconsistent_logic). Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply migration via Supabase MCP apply_migration. Run engine/tools/validate.py with venv Python so the live graph audit engages. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED (mirrors P5-01a/P5-01b/P5-02a/P5-02b; well above 70% INTERPRETED floor per phase_5.md T2-B). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in v1 registry). Cross-domain edges (modality_metaphysics→modal_logic; epistemic_closure→propositional_logic; vagueness→sorites within philosophy of language reaches; etc.) deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Sub-range slots 0091-0099 left reserved (granularity principle achieved within 0090). Two-commit pattern per S-0053/S-0054/S-0056 procedural finding: deliverable commit (migration + ROUTING.md) split from auto_target.json status-flip commit so the staged scope-check engages on deliverables under in_progress task. End state: P5-03 complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-03 passes both criteria. graph_version 5→6. phase: P_5
outcome_summary: Phase 5 logic seed (P5-03) lands at S-0057. 26 nodes + 34 edges across six clusters phase_5.md T1-B names plus a 3-node foundation tier: foundation (propositional_logic / predicate_logic / classical_logic), modal logic (modal_logic / accessibility_relation / kripke_semantics / modal_systems_hierarchy K-T-S4-S5), conditionals (material / indicative / counterfactual / conditional_logic Stalnaker-Lewis), paradox (semantic_paradox umbrella / liar Eubulides+Tarski+Kripke+Field / russell 1901 / curry 1942), vagueness (umbrella / sorites / supervaluationism Fine 1975 / epistemicism Williamson 1994 / fuzzy Łukasiewicz-Zadeh-Smith), paraconsistent (explosion_principle / paraconsistent_logic LP-relevance-adaptive / dialetheism Priest 1979), deontic (von Wright 1951 SDL / chisholm 1963 contrary-to-duty / ross 1941 disjunctive permission). 6-tier layered DAG; graph_version 5→6; live totals 132 nodes 172 edges in paideia-dev. Both P5-03 criteria PASS. Cold-review pass: 10/10 verified — sub-agent confirmed counts, single-tag domain[]={'logic'}, graph_version=6 everywhere, transaction wrap, all source/target IDs resolve within migration, layered DAG no cycles, 100% INTERPRETED, no new predicates, rollback-list = 26 inserted IDs, cluster sizes match (3+4+4+4+5+3+3=26). Boot-freshness fast-forward exercised at boot — first non-test-fixture exercise of routine_boot_freshness.py per ADR 0052; mechanism fast-forwarded 3 commits to origin/main before shared-state reads, exactly as docstring contract describes; without it would have re-claimed S-0056. Two-commit pattern continued: deliverable commit 211320b (0090_*.sql + ROUTING.md narrative) staged scope-check engaged with 4 checks 0 fails; status flip + close bundled in this close commit. validate.py: 30 checks, 0 hard-fails, 128 soft-warns (126 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C partial-seed shape with 132 total nodes; 2 issue_collision = upstream MemPalace #1/#2). 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. Sub-range slots 0091-0099 left reserved (granularity principle achieved within 0090). Backlog unchanged: 2 upstream MemPalace #1/#2 remain. ADR 0052 file collision noted (two files match id 0052 — routine-boot-freshness vs phase-5-philosophy-subdomain-decomposition; P5-12 closeout's adr_status criterion FAILS on this; out-of-scope for P5-03, flagged for P5-12 closeout session). Forward state: P5-03 complete; logic subdomain fully seeded. Phase 5: 5/16 tasks complete; 5/18 routine sessions consumed.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was ~25-28 nodes / ~32-40 edges across the six logic clusters; delivered exactly 26 nodes and 34 edges. All other declared properties delivered exactly: 100% INTERPRETED confidence_level, PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md untouched, no cross-domain edges, sub-range slots 0091-0099 left reserved, two-commit pattern (deliverable 211320b + close commit), graph_version 5→6 honored. The plan declared a target node-range of 25-28 to allow for cluster-rebalancing during authoring; the final 26 lands inside that band. No descoping, no reordering, no mid-session deferrals beyond the master-plan-named cross-domain edges to P5-11.

side_discoveries.reasoning: The phrase 'philosophy of math / ethics deferred to P5-11' in commit 211320b's message is a legitimate scope-deferral named in the master plan (phase_5.md T2-G #1: cross-domain edges are P5-11's exclusive responsibility, not a side-discovery introduced by this session). Routine sessions documenting this deferral in their commit messages is the documented practice from S-0050/S-0053/S-0054/S-0056; no tracking surface beyond the master plan is warranted.
